name: Incorrect Behavior Order: Validate Before Canonicalize
description: The product validates input before canonicalizing it (resolving path traversal, decoding, normalizing), allowing attackers to provide encoded or non-canonical input that passes validation but resolves to a dangerous value after canonicalization.
detection_pattern: CONTROL[input_validation] runs before TRANSFORM[canonicalize] (path resolution, URL decode, Unicode normalize), so input passes validation in non-canonical form then resolves to a dangerous canonical form at STORAGE or EXTERNAL, without reordering to canonicalize-then-validate
